notes: Make your profile yours! Pick your avatar's color AND art style yourself — no longer locked to the Pokémon's type. Free: the Aura style plus any color from the palette. Premium: any style plus a full color wheel for literally any color. New one-tap 'Match my Pokémon' color shortcut. Polished profiles: clearer level badge, a proper Edit Profile button, copy your trainer code, and a richer header. Other players' profiles now show a themed banner with Followers/Joined/Friends stats, and the live name effect previews while you edit.
